blocks.en: Every Wi-Fi transmission is a frame: a sequence of fields with a fixed meaning. The header carries the addresses and control bits; the body carries your data; a checksum at the end catches corruption.
blocks.zh: 每一次 Wi-Fi 传输都是一个帧：一串含义固定的字段。帧头携带地址与控制比特；帧体携带你的数据；末尾的校验和用于发现传输错误。

blocks.en: Click each field below to see what it does. The widths are roughly proportional to each field's size in octets (bytes).
blocks.zh: 点击下面每个字段查看其作用。各字段宽度大致与其字节数成比例。

desc.en: Type/subtype of the frame plus control flags (to-DS, from-DS, retry, power-mgmt, protected).
desc.zh: 帧的类型/子类型以及控制标志（to-DS、from-DS、重传、电源管理、加密）。

desc.en: How long the medium will stay busy — lets other stations defer (the NAV).
desc.zh: 信道将保持忙碌多久——让其他站点据此退避（NAV）。

desc.en: The receiver address (who should pick this frame up).
desc.zh: 接收方地址（谁应当接收此帧）。
发送方地址（谁发送了此帧）。

desc.en: Often the BSSID or the original source/destination, depending on the DS flags.
desc.zh: 通常是 BSSID，或原始源/目的地址，取决于 DS 标志。

desc.en: Sequence and fragment numbers, used to detect duplicates and reassemble.
desc.zh: 序列号与分片号，用于检测重复帧并重组。

desc.en: The actual payload — your data, or management information elements. Variable length.
desc.zh: 真正的载荷——你的数据，或管理用的信息元素。长度可变。

desc.en: Frame Check Sequence: a CRC over the frame so the receiver can detect corruption.
desc.zh: 帧校验序列：对帧做 CRC，使接收方能检测传输错误。

blocks.en: The Frame Body of a management frame is built from Information Elements (IEs): little tag-length-value blocks, each starting with an Element ID. This is how capabilities and parameters are advertised.
blocks.zh: 管理帧的帧体由信息元素（IE）构成：一个个“标签-长度-值”小块，每个以 Element ID 开头。能力与参数就是这样被通告的。

blocks.en: The general MAC frame format is defined in 9.2.3, the Frame Control field in 9.2.4.1, and the catalog of Information Elements (each with an Element ID) begins at clause 9.4.2.
blocks.zh: 通用 MAC 帧格式定义于 9.2.3 节，帧控制字段定义于 9.2.4.1 节，信息元素目录（每个带一个 Element ID）从 9.4.2 节开始。

q.en: What is the FCS field for?
q.zh: FCS 字段的作用是什么？

options.en: Detecting whether the frame was corrupted in flight
options.zh: 检测帧在传输中是否损坏

cites.note: general frame format, Frame Control, Elements
